overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character with red hair traversing a snowy mountain path. The character walks steadily through a winter landscape featuring snow-covered trees, rocky cliffs, and ancient stone ruins under an overcast sky with light snowfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy valley with ancient stone ruins

events.description: character passes wooden signpost on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the snowy path through the mountain valley, passing stone ruins on the right

entered.detail: ancient stone wall covered in snow, running parallel to the path
tall wooden pole with lantern attached, marking the trail
scattered evergreen trees with heavy snow on branches
distant snow-capped mountain range under overcast sky
steep rocky mountainside forming the left boundary of the valley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide snowy mountain valley. The character walks along a path bordered by an ancient stone wall on the right and scattered pine trees on the left. Distant mountain peaks are visible through the hazy atmosphere as the character passes a wooden signpost.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain trail with scattered trees and rock formations

events.description: stone ruins exit view as path enters more forested area with denser trees
terrain becomes more enclosed as rock walls begin closing in on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as the environment transitions from open valley to narrower trail with more vegetation

entered.detail: massive boulder partially covered in snow beside the trail
tall vertical rock face rising immediately beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a transitional area where the stone ruins fall behind and the path becomes lined with more dense snow-covered trees. Large rock formations appear beside the trail as the valley begins to narrow, with steep rock walls emerging on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass with steep rocky cliffs on both sides

events.description: entering narrow mountain pass with high rock walls enclosing the path on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through the misty narrow pass between tall rock formations, with limited visibility ahead

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the right wall of the narrow pass
hazy mountain pass extending into the distance with reduced visibility

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a narrow mountain pass enclosed by steep rock walls on both sides. The path continues through the misty corridor with snow-covered trees visible on the slopes above. The atmosphere becomes more enclosed and intimate as the character progresses deeper into the mountain terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide snowy valley that gradually tightens into a narrow, enclosed mountain pass. It begins with the character walking along a path bordered by an ancient stone wall and scattered pine trees, with distant peaks visible through a hazy atmosphere. As the character passes a wooden signpost, the stone ruins fall behind and the trail becomes lined with denser snow-covered trees. The scene then shifts as the valley begins to narrow, with large rock formations and steep walls emerging on the left side. Finally, the path leads deep into a misty corridor enclosed by towering rock walls on both sides, creating a more intimate atmosphere as the character progresses further into the mountain terrain.
